Join us this Friday, 27th of February, for a special Erasmus Club Iftar night

As Ramadan brings people together around the same table, we want to recreate that warm, family atmosphere with all of you. This evening is about sharing a meal, sharing stories, and sharing cultures. Whether you’re experiencing Ramadan for the first time or it’s a tradition you’ve grown up with, this is the perfect opportunity to connect, meet new people, and enjoy a meaningful and memorable night together. Spots are limited, so make sure to fill out the form as soon as possible so we can confirm your attendance and plan accordingly.

On Friday, 26 December, we’re turning up the energy with the Karaoke Night at the Frej Coffee & Art House

A night to let loose, sing your heart out (on or off key), laugh, and actually enjoy being together. Whether you grab the mic or just cheer from your seat, it’s all about having fun, meeting new people, and making the most of the night. We start at 6:00 PM. We’d be delighted to have you join us

This Friday, 12 December, we’re launching the first edition of our Speaking Club under the Istanbul Galata University Erasmus Club

A space to talk, listen, disagree, laugh, and truly connect. We’ll explore different topics, share ideas and perspectives, and get to know each other through real conversation with no pressure, just genuine exchange. We start at 4:00 PM in the Frej Building. We’d be delighted to have you join us
